collocation: a relatively __ phenomenon；rare + N 修飾抽象名詞
explanation: 易與 (I) natural 混淆——natural形容「天生的」而非「罕見程度」，句意需要的是「稀有度」而非「真假」。

collocation: a sign of __；抽象名詞當 of 受詞
explanation: 易誤選 (J) presence，但 presence(存在)無法呼應「文化偏好、視為美的象徵」的語意；此處需具體指「吸引力」這個抽象特質。

collocation: a genetic __ caused by...；genetic 修飾名詞
explanation: 考生常以為酒窩正面=優點，忽略 Though...but actually 的語意反轉，誤選 (D) attractiveness——但該格前有 Though，句意已轉為「其實是缺陷」。

collocation: the __ of dimples from parents to children；of 片語限定名詞
explanation: 與 (B) exhibit(展現)詞性/語意都不合，此格需要「遺傳傳遞」的動作名詞，注意 the __ of A from B to C 的搭配結構。

collocation: will not __ the trait；情態助動詞 + 原形動詞
explanation: 考生易受前一格 (H) transfer 干擾誤選，但此格為動詞，前面是 will not，必須用原形動詞；exhibit the trait＝表現出這個特徵。

collocation: due to the __ of excessive fat；due to the N of...
explanation: 與32題 (D) attractiveness 選項互相干擾，需依語意「因為脂肪的存在」而非「吸引力」判斷，注意 due to + N 的名詞用法。

collocation: their __ cheeks；形容詞修飾 cheeks
explanation: 此為典型「先埋線索、後面才解釋」寫法——後句 lose their baby fat 才點出這格在講嬰兒肥，需前後文互相對照才能鎖定答案。

collocation: the dimples may __ with time；情態助動詞 + 原形動詞
explanation: 考生容易忽略 with time(隨時間)這個副詞片語，其實正是「fade淡化」的關鍵搭配詞提示。

collocation: born without __ dimples；形容詞修飾 dimples
explanation: 易與31題 (F) rare 搞混——此格談的是「是否天生」，而非「稀不稀有」，需回頭比對兩格語意差異。

collocation: These methods __ from A to B；range from A to B 固定搭配
explanation: 此為經典固定搭配 range from...to...，若不熟悉此搭配詞考生常誤選其他選項；此格也是本文唯一動詞詞性的收尾句。

collocation: __ their anniversary celebration；ruin + N(慶祝活動)
explanation: 考生易誤選其他選項，需注意 ruin 為及物動詞，直接接受詞 celebration，且與後面 for 子句(玫瑰花總是遲到一個月)構成因果解釋。

collocation: __ on V-ing；insist on + 動名詞固定搭配
explanation: insist 後面接 on，是常考固定搭配，考生易漏接介詞或誤用其他動詞。

collocation: had the list __；have + O + adj. 受詞補語結構
explanation: 此句型為「have+受詞+形容詞」表示「使某物處於某狀態」，考生易誤判詞性、選成動詞。

collocation: the __ that he made；purchase 當名詞用(非動詞「購買」)
explanation: purchase 常見是動詞，但此格前有 the、後接 that 子句，需要名詞「所買之物」，是典型詞性陷阱。

collocation: different from Mom's __；different from + N
explanation: 此格與前文「shopping list」形成前後呼應——list 上的品項＝Mom 的 requests，屬於跨句同指的改寫手法。

collocation: he was __ with many secrets；be trusted with + N 被動搭配
explanation: be trusted with 是固定被動搭配，意思是「被託付、被信任掌管某事」，考生易忽略 with 介詞。

collocation: had the __ of V-ing；the privilege of + 動名詞
explanation: privilege 常考固定搭配 the privilege of doing，考生易與 advantage 等近義詞混淆但詞性/搭配不同。

collocation: The reason was __ ：後面接冒號解釋原因
explanation: 此格靠邏輯推論：冒號後方直接說明「爸爸不會記得」，呼應「原因很明顯」的語意，沒有明顯搭配詞可循。

collocation: would never be __；助動詞被動式
explanation: revealed 為被動語態動詞，考生易與形容詞選項混淆；此格也呼應前文「secrets」，屬於秘密「被揭露」與否的邏輯延續。

collocation: cared __ about；care little about 固定用法
explanation: care little about 是常考固定片語，意思是「不太在乎」，考生易誤解 little 詞性或誤選其他選項。

collocation: several __ stories；competing + N(複數故事)
explanation: competing 是分詞當形容詞，修飾「彼此矛盾/競爭」的多個說法，考生易與其他選項混淆詞性。

collocation: __ the cookie's origin back to...；trace back to 固定搭配
explanation: traces 此處是動詞第三人稱單數，「追溯至」，容易與名詞 traces(痕跡)搞混，是常見詞性陷阱。

collocation: __ plans for a revolution；secret 修飾 plans
explanation: secret 在此為形容詞修飾 plans(計畫)，語意直接對應「藏在月餅裡的起義計畫」。

collocation: turned out to be __；turn out to be + adj 固定句型
explanation: turn out to be 是常考句型，表示「結果證明是…」，考生需掌握此結構才能判斷後面接形容詞。

collocation: the __ we know of today as fortune cookies；treats 呼應「fortune cookies」
explanation: 此格用 treats 同義替代前面反覆出現的 fortune cookie，是典型跨句同義改寫，考生需理解代換邏輯而非死記字義。

collocation: Another __ claims that...；account 呼應前文的 stories
explanation: account 在此指「一種說法/版本」，與第一段的 stories 同義替代，屬於全文詞彙變化避免重複的手法。

collocation: Each cookie __ a strip of paper；contain 及物動詞
explanation: contained 是及物動詞過去式，直接接受詞 a strip of paper，考生易與其他選項的詞性混淆。

collocation: first __ in 1907 or 1914；appear 不及物動詞
explanation: appeared 後面直接接地方/時間副詞(in San Francisco)，不需受詞，是常考不及物動詞搭配。

collocation: appeal to American __；taste 在此非「味覺」而是「品味/喜好」
explanation: taste 是多義字，此處指抽象的「品味／喜好」而非具體「味覺感受」，考生易只知常見義而誤解句意。

collocation: __ the thank-you notes with fortune notes；replace A with B 固定搭配
explanation: replace A with B 是經典固定搭配，考生需認出「用B取代A」的邏輯方向，避免顛倒A、B。

collocation: no culture __ onions quite as much as...；比較句型 as much as
explanation: 此格需理解「no culture...as much as」的比較邏輯(沒有文化像埃及人那樣崇拜)，沒有明顯固定搭配可直接對應。

collocation: significant __ meaning；spiritual 修飾 meaning
explanation: spiritual meaning 是常見固定搭配，考生需掌握「精神/宗教意涵」這個抽象概念。

collocation: considered to be __ of eternal life；symbol of + N
explanation: symbol of 是固定搭配，表示「…的象徵」，考生易與其他抽象名詞選項混淆。

collocation: structure...__ the eternity of existence；reflect 引申義(非「反射光線」)
explanation: reflect 是多義字，此處取「體現／反映(抽象概念)」的引申義，而非物理上的「反射」，考生易只知常見義。

collocation: the __ power of the vegetable；healing 修飾 power
explanation: healing power 是固定搭配，「療癒的力量」，考生需辨別 healing 當形容詞用的用法。

collocation: paintings __ inside pyramids；過去分詞修飾 paintings(被動意義)
explanation: discovered 是過去分詞當形容詞用，修飾前面的 paintings(壁畫被發現於…)，考生易誤用原形動詞。

collocation: They __ as a funeral offering；function as 固定搭配
explanation: function as 是常考固定搭配，「作為…之用」，考生需掌握 function 當動詞的用法。

collocation: various __ of their bodies；parts of the body 固定搭配
explanation: parts of the body 是常見固定搭配，考生易誤選其他抽象名詞。

collocation: onion flowers __ their pelvis...；現在分詞片語修飾前面名詞
explanation: decorating 是現在分詞，表示「洋蔥花裝飾著身體部位」的主動修飾關係，考生易與過去分詞選項混淆。

collocation: would __ the dead to breathe again；prompt sb to V 固定搭配
explanation: prompt someone to do something 是常考固定搭配，「促使某人做某事」，考生需認出此結構。

collocation: this is not necessarily __；not necessarily + adj
explanation: 此格需靠邏輯推論：呼應前一句「森林是否一定天然」的提問，此處是回答「不一定如此」，沒有明顯搭配詞可循。

collocation: with the __ of V-ing；with the vision of 固定搭配
explanation: with the vision of doing sth 是常考固定搭配，表示「懷著…的願景/構想」。

collocation: people thought he was __ to V；think sb + adj + to V 句型
explanation: 此為「認為某人做某事很瘋狂」的句型結構，crazy to waste，考生需掌握此句構才能判斷詞性與語意。

collocation: he simply __ them；ignore 及物動詞
explanation: ignored 為及物動詞，直接接受詞 them(指質疑他的人)，語意呼應下一句「繼續埋頭苦幹」的堅持態度。

collocation: The land was so __ that...；so...that 因果句型
explanation: so...that 是常考因果句型(如此…以致於)，考生需辨認 dry 才能呼應後面「需要每天澆水多次」的結果。

collocation: none of the trees he planted __；否定句邏輯
explanation: 此格需邏輯推論：頭兩年「沒有一棵樹活下來」，需與後文 However第三年開始生長 形成對比呼應。

collocation: Greatly __ by the result；分詞構句置於句首
explanation: encouraged 是過去分詞構句，置於句首修飾主詞 Kareem(被結果鼓舞)，考生易誤用現在分詞。

collocation: without the __ of humans；without the interference of 固定搭配
explanation: without the interference of 是常見固定搭配，「沒有…的干預」。

collocation: a piece of __ property；deserted 修飾 property(非「沙漠的」)
explanation: deserted 是多義字易混淆——此處指「荒廢無人使用的」，而非「沙漠的」(desert)，考生需分辨拼字相近詞的意義差異。

collocation: come to visit his __；creation 呼應「他親手打造的森林」
explanation: 此格用 creation 同義代稱前文反覆提到的「森林」，是跨句同指的改寫手法，需理解代換邏輯。

collocation: This common __ is a wonder；device 泛指「裝置」(此處=迴紋針)
explanation: device 是多義字中的常見泛稱用法，考生需知道它可以泛指前面提到的具體物品(迴紋針)，而不只是「電子裝置」的意思。

collocation: easily __；easy + 形容詞子句
explanation: removable 是 -able 結尾形容詞，表「可被移除的」，考生需辨別此詞性後綴規律。

collocation: stretched and __ various clip-like objects；twist into 固定搭配
explanation: twist into 是固定搭配，「扭轉成…形狀」，與前面的 stretched 並列，考生需注意兩個動詞平行結構。

collocation: The name most frequently __ the paperclip invention；be associated with 固定搭配
explanation: associated with 是常考固定搭配，「與…相關聯」，考生需掌握完整片語不能只選 associate。

collocation: The __ looped design；familiar 修飾 design(非「熟悉某人」)
explanation: familiar 是多義字，此處指「常見的、為人熟知的」設計，而非「(某人)熟悉的」，考生易誤解語意方向。

collocation: This clip is therefore sometimes __ the Gem clip；be known as 固定搭配
explanation: be known as 是常考固定搭配，「被稱為…」，考生易與 known for(以…聞名)搞混。

collocation: played an important __ role；historical role 固定搭配
explanation: historical role 是常見固定搭配，「歷史性的角色」。

collocation: any __ of their national unity；symbol of 固定搭配
explanation: symbol of 是固定搭配，「…的象徵」，呼應後文「配戴迴紋針表達團結」的語意。

collocation: in __, they started wearing paperclips；in protest 固定片語
explanation: in protest 是固定片語，「以示抗議」，考生需認出此介系詞片語用法。

collocation: erected...to __ Vaaler；honor 當動詞用(非常見的名詞用法)
explanation: honor 常見是名詞(榮譽)，但此處當動詞「向…致敬」，是典型詞性陷阱，考生易只知名詞用法。

collocation: show __ for；show respect for 固定搭配
explanation: show respect for 是常考固定搭配，「表達對…的尊敬」。

collocation: a tradition of __ the father's first name；of + 動名詞
explanation: 介系詞 of 後面需接動名詞，passing down 表「傳承」，考生易誤用原形動詞。

collocation: to __ a family surname going；keep + O + Ving 使役結構
explanation: keep...going 是固定句型，「讓…持續下去」，考生需辨認 keep 在此的動詞用法。

collocation: For a long time, __ has also played an important role；主詞名詞
explanation: 此格需靠邏輯推論：段落主題是宗教對命名的影響，且後文舉聖經人名為例，呼應此處主詞應為 religion。

collocation: names __ things of beauty；分詞片語修飾 names
explanation: involving 是現在分詞，修飾前面的 names(涉及美好事物的名字)，考生易誤用其他詞性。

collocation: Flower and plant names...__ this category；fall into 固定搭配
explanation: fall into a category 是常考固定搭配，「歸屬於某類別」。

collocation: has had a great __ on...；have an impact on 固定搭配
explanation: have an impact on 是常考固定搭配，「對…造成影響」。

collocation: strongly __ a character；be drawn to 固定搭配
explanation: be drawn to 是常考固定搭配，「被…吸引」，考生易誤用 draw 的其他形式。

collocation: make their children more __ and distinctive；與 distinctive 並列近義形容詞
explanation: unique 與後面的 distinctive 是近義並列，考生需理解兩者語意接近、共同修飾 children。

collocation: pick a name...__ of its meaning；regardless of 固定搭配
explanation: regardless of 是常考固定搭配，「不論、不管」，考生易與 regard 其他形式混淆。

collocation: lay their eggs and __ from predators；escape from 固定搭配
explanation: escape from 是常考固定搭配，「從…逃脫」，考生易漏接介詞 from。

collocation: Some species might even become __；become + adj(過去分詞轉形容詞)
explanation: endangered 是過去分詞轉形容詞用法，「瀕危的」，考生需辨認 become 後接形容詞的結構。

collocation: __, however, they are now in serious danger；句首語氣副詞+however並用
explanation: sadly 是句首語氣副詞，表達作者遺憾的態度，與 however 並用加強轉折語氣，屬於固定的語氣鋪陳句型。

collocation: Many might not even __ that long；last 當動詞(非形容詞「最後的」)
explanation: last 是多義字，此處當動詞「持續、維持」，而非常見的形容詞「最後的」，考生易誤解詞性。

collocation: three main causes have been __；現在完成式被動語態
explanation: identified 是被動語態動詞，「已被找出」，考生需辨認 have been + p.p. 的完成式被動結構。

collocation: which __ the poisons into the ocean；關代 which 引導的子句動詞
explanation: 此格為關係子句的動詞，指前面的 rainwater/streams「將毒素帶入海洋」，需理解關係代名詞的先行詞邏輯。

collocation: less __ to diseases；resistance to 固定搭配
explanation: resistance to 是常考固定搭配，「對…的抵抗力」。

collocation: the coral...dies __；eventually 表結果的時間副詞
explanation: eventually 是多義字辨析的一種——需分辨「最終」與「立刻/quickly」等其他時間副詞的語意差異。

collocation: contributing to the __ of coral reefs；contribute to the N of 固定搭配
explanation: contribute to the N of 是常考固定搭配，「導致…的消失」。

collocation: collect for __ since it is so colorful；因果邏輯(顏色鮮豔→拿來做紀念品)
explanation: 此格需邏輯推論：因為珊瑚「色彩鮮豔漂亮」，人們才會採集來做紀念品，沒有明顯固定搭配可直接對應。

collocation: coded with __ types of numbers；various + N(複數)
explanation: various types of 是常見固定搭配，「各種類型的」。

collocation: The __ of this convention；the disadvantage of 固定搭配
explanation: the disadvantage of 是常考固定搭配，「…的缺點」。

collocation: only __ names were used；female 修飾 names
explanation: 此格需邏輯推論：後文解釋「因為颱風以委員的女友或妻子命名」，故此處應為 female(女性)名字。

collocation: against the original naming __；naming practice 固定搭配
explanation: naming practice 是固定搭配，「命名慣例」。

collocation: to __ Asians' awareness；raise awareness 固定搭配
explanation: raise awareness 是常考固定搭配，「提升意識/認知」。

collocation: a name pool __ of 140 names；be composed of 固定搭配
explanation: be composed of 是常考固定搭配，「由…組成」，考生易與 compose 的其他形式混淆。

collocation: Korea and Japan __ animal names；favor 當動詞(非「恩惠」)
explanation: favor 是多義字，此處當動詞「偏好」，而非常見的名詞「恩惠、favor」，考生易只知名詞義。

collocation: they will be __；未來式被動語態
explanation: 此格需邏輯推論：140個名字用完後「循環使用」，呼應後文「名字可被除名替換」的除名機制脈絡。

collocation: it can __ that the name...be deleted；request that + 原形動詞(假設語氣)
explanation: request that 子句需用「原形動詞」(假設語氣)，是常考特殊句型，考生易忘記用原形而誤用第三人稱單數。

collocation: were __ with other names in 2007；replace A with B 固定搭配
explanation: replace...with... 是固定搭配，「用…取代…」。原稿選項字母此處疑似誤植為C(disadvantage)，但C已用於32題且語意不通，依語意與選項不重複使用之通例訂正為G。

collocation: this __ snack；popular 修飾 snack
explanation: 此格需邏輯推論：呼應第一句「rarely fail to make...more fun」，說明爆米花是廣受歡迎的零食。

collocation: can cause health __；health problems 固定搭配
explanation: health problems 是常見固定搭配，「健康問題」。

collocation: coat...with a __ called PFOA；a chemical called X 固定搭配
explanation: a chemical called X 是常見固定搭配，「一種叫做X的化學物質」。

collocation: the butter substitute that generally __ with...；come with 固定搭配
explanation: come with 是常考固定搭配，「附帶有…」，考生易漏接介詞 with。

collocation: is __ for some serious lung diseases；be responsible for 固定搭配
explanation: be responsible for 是常考固定搭配，「導致/應為…負責」。此字選項在原稿清單中被漏列，已依語意補回。

collocation: an easy and __ alternative；healthy 修飾 alternative
explanation: healthy alternative 是常見固定搭配，「健康的替代方案」。

collocation: All that is __ is...；all that is + p.p. 句型
explanation: all that is needed is... 是常考句型，「所需要的只是…」，考生需辨認 needed 的被動分詞用法。

collocation: the kernels start __；start + V-ing 固定搭配
explanation: start popping 表「開始爆開」，考生需辨認 start 後接動名詞的用法。此字選項在原稿清單中被漏列，已依語意補回。

collocation: __ the pot from the stove；remove...from 固定搭配
explanation: remove...from 是常考固定搭配，「把…從…移開」，此處為步驟指示的祈使句。

collocation: season with a small __ of...；a small amount of 固定搭配
explanation: a small amount of 是常見固定搭配，「少量的…」。

collocation: an invaluable __；teacher 此處為隱喻(足球=老師)
explanation: teacher 在此非字面「授課教師」，而是比喻足球扮演的教育角色，考生需理解隱喻寫法而非只知字面義。

collocation: the practice __；practice field 固定搭配
explanation: practice field 是常見固定搭配，「練習場」。

collocation: prepares them to be __ citizens；比較級形容詞修飾 citizens
explanation: 此格需邏輯推論：football 訓練帶來的正面效果，讓球員成為「更好的」公民，屬於上下文語意判斷。

collocation: only through the __ of each member；through the cooperation of 固定搭配
explanation: through the cooperation of 是常考固定搭配，「透過…的合作」。

collocation: must always __ on the field；remember 此處省略受詞(承接前句 lesson)
explanation: 此格為省略受詞的用法(remember it)，考生需理解上下文承接關係，而非死記固定搭配。

collocation: remain __ from the society；remain isolated from 固定搭配
explanation: remain isolated from 是常考固定搭配，「保持與…隔絕」。

collocation: must __ himself as such；behave oneself 固定搭配
explanation: behave oneself 是固定搭配，「使自己循規蹈矩」，考生易漏接反身代名詞 himself。

collocation: can he do his __；do one's share 固定搭配
explanation: do one's share 是常考固定搭配，「盡自己的本分」。

collocation: teamwork is __ in modern living；be essential in 固定搭配
explanation: be essential in 是常考固定搭配，「在…中是必要的」。

collocation: if the nation is to __；if 條件句 + 原形動詞
explanation: 此格需邏輯推論：「若國家要興盛」的條件句意，考生需理解 if...is to V 的句型判斷動詞語意方向。

collocation: the __ fable can be extended；same 呼應前文的 this popular version
explanation: same 在此用來同指「這個大家熟悉的版本」，是跨句同指的改寫手法，而非單純字面「相同」。

collocation: a second race is __；race is arranged 被動搭配
explanation: arranged 是被動語態動詞，「被安排」，考生需辨認 be + p.p. 的被動結構。

collocation: __, consistent will always beat slow and steady；與 slow and steady 相對的形容詞組
explanation: fast 在此與後面的 consistent 並列，構成與經典版本「slow and steady」相對的新寓意，考生需理解對照關係。

collocation: it is the tortoise that __ the hare to a third race；challenge sb to N 固定搭配
explanation: challenge someone to something 是常考固定搭配，「向某人挑戰某事」。

collocation: First __ your strengths；祈使句原形動詞
explanation: identify your strengths 是常見固定搭配，「找出自己的優勢」，此處為祈使句需用原形動詞。

collocation: Both __ know their own drawbacks；competitors 呼應前文的烏龜與兔子
explanation: competitors 在此同指「烏龜與兔子」這兩位參賽者，是跨句改寫的手法，考生需理解代換邏輯。

collocation: The two __ as a team；cooperate as a team 固定搭配
explanation: cooperate as a team 是常考固定搭配，「以團隊方式合作」。

collocation: swims to the __ bank of the river；opposite bank 固定搭配
explanation: opposite bank 是常見固定搭配，「對岸」。

collocation: reach the __ line together；finishing line 固定搭配
explanation: finishing line 是常考固定搭配，「終點線」。

collocation: the importance of __；呼應前文 cooperate as a team
explanation: teamwork 呼應前段「兩者合作如一個團隊」的具體描述，是全文寓意的總結性同義代稱。

collocation: Having received this __；分詞構句，promise 呼應前段弟子的承諾
explanation: promise 在此同指前段弟子「願意做任何事報答師恩」的承諾，屬於跨句同指的改寫，而非單獨新資訊。

collocation: I've just __ that...；have just + p.p. 現在完成式
explanation: learn that 子句是常考固定搭配，「得知…」，注意現在完成式 have just + p.p. 的結構。

collocation: You'll __ me by a mark on my brow；recognize sb by + 特徵 固定搭配
explanation: recognize someone by 是常考固定搭配，「藉由…認出某人」。

collocation: with one __ of your knife；one stroke of 固定搭配
explanation: one stroke of a knife 是常見固定搭配，「手起刀落的一擊」。

collocation: I'll then be __ from a pig's life；be released from 固定搭配
explanation: be released from 是常考固定搭配，「從…中被解脫」。

collocation: Soon after their __, the guru died；soon after + N 固定搭配
explanation: soon after their conversation 是常見固定搭配，「他們對話後不久」，考生需注意逗號後面才是主要子句(guru died)。

collocation: the disciple __ his knife；sharpen a knife 固定搭配
explanation: sharpen a knife 是常見固定搭配，「磨刀」，考生需辨認及物動詞直接接受詞 knife 的結構。

collocation: the little pig suddenly __, “Stop!”；scream + 直接引語
explanation: scream 後面直接接引號內容，是常見的「動詞+直接引語」寫作手法。

collocation: recover from the __ of hearing...；the shock of + 動名詞 固定搭配
explanation: the shock of V-ing 是常考固定搭配，「…帶來的震驚」。

collocation: what a pig's life would be __；what...be like 固定句型(問狀態，非「喜歡」)
explanation: like 在此是介系詞，what...be like 詢問「…是什麼樣子」，考生易誤把 like 當動詞「喜歡」解釋，是常見多義字陷阱。

collocation: the boys were particularly __；particularly + adj
explanation: 此格需邏輯推論：呼應第一句「boys playing cricket and making a lot of noise」的困擾，此處特別強調「特別吵鬧的那一晚」。

collocation: playing his __ game；favorite game 固定搭配
explanation: favorite game 是常見固定搭配，「最喜愛的遊戲」。

collocation: something they __；關係子句省略關代 that/which
explanation: 此格為關係子句動詞，指男孩「本來就喜歡做的事」，考生需理解省略關代的子句結構。

collocation: went away __ their 25 rupees；副詞修飾 went away
explanation: happily 是副詞，修飾 went away，考生需辨認詞性(易與形容詞選項混淆)。

collocation: he had __ money；run out of 固定搭配
explanation: run out of money 是常考固定搭配，「錢用完了」。

collocation: had not yet received his __ from the government；receive one's paycheck 固定搭配
explanation: 此格需邏輯推論：老人假裝自己也是靠政府發薪水過活，用來解釋為何要減少給男孩的錢。

collocation: The boys were very __；be disappointed 固定搭配
explanation: be disappointed 是常見固定搭配，「感到失望」。

collocation: waiting for their __；reward 同指前文的「25盧比酬勞」
explanation: reward 在此同指男孩每週領到的酬勞，是跨句改寫的手法。

collocation: pay them 25 rupees as he had __；as + had + p.p. 過去完成式子句
explanation: as he had promised 是常考固定搭配，「如同他先前承諾的」，注意過去完成式表示「比過去更早」的時間點。

collocation: play seven days a week for __ five rupees；merely 修飾金額，語帶不滿
explanation: 此格需邏輯推論：男孩用 merely 強調金額少得可憐，語氣中帶著憤怒與諷刺，是全文情緒轉折的高點。

collocation: a quick __ to a doctor；visit to 固定搭配
explanation: visit to a doctor 是常見固定搭配，「看醫生一趟」。

collocation: has to be your own __；one's own responsibility 固定搭配
explanation: one's own responsibility 是常見固定搭配，「自己的責任」。

collocation: __ symptoms of illness；與 keeping、ignoring 並列的動名詞
explanation: 此格為三個並列動名詞之一(keeping bad habits, neglecting symptoms, ignoring rules)，考生需辨認平行結構詞性。

collocation: health specialists __ the idea of wellness；promote an idea 固定搭配
explanation: promote an idea 是常見固定搭配，「推廣某個理念」。

collocation: Wellness means __ the best possible health；mean + 動名詞
explanation: mean 後面接動名詞作受詞，achieving 表示「達成」，考生需辨認此文法結構。

collocation: a lot of __ exercise；與後文 more challenging exercise 相對
explanation: easier 與後文的 more challenging 形成語意對照，考生需理解前後對比關係才能判斷正確形容詞。

collocation: Understanding...is the __；key 此處為名詞「關鍵」(非「鑰匙」)
explanation: key 是多義字，此處取抽象義「關鍵」，而非具體物品「鑰匙」，考生易只知常見義。

collocation: avoiding __ disease；chronic disease 固定搭配
explanation: chronic disease 是常見固定搭配，「慢性疾病」。

collocation: carelessness can __ good health；ruin + N(健康) 固定搭配
explanation: ruin good health 是常見固定搭配，「破壞健康」。

collocation: you can __ the risk；lower the risk 固定搭配
explanation: lower the risk 是常見固定搭配，「降低風險」。

collocation: love will last __；last forever 固定搭配
explanation: last forever 是常見固定搭配，「永遠持續」。

collocation: we are __ from the problems；free from 固定搭配
explanation: free from 是常考固定搭配，「免於…」。

collocation: daily life __；take over 固定搭配
explanation: take over 是常見固定搭配，「接管、佔上風」，此處指日常生活取代了戀愛初期的浪漫。

collocation: women, __, expect men to...；插入語，與前句 men...expect women 平行對照
explanation: similarly 是插入語副詞，用來連接與前句平行對照的句子結構(男生如何、女生同樣地如何)，考生需理解對稱句型。

collocation: __ taking time to understand...；instead of + 動名詞
explanation: instead of 後面接動名詞，是常考固定搭配，「不…而是」。

collocation: __, our relationships are filled with...；句首連接副詞，表結果
explanation: Consequently 是常見句首連接副詞，表示「因此、結果」，考生需辨認邏輯連接詞的語意方向(因果非對比)。

collocation: communication __；communication breaks down 固定搭配
explanation: communication breaks down 是常見固定搭配，「溝通破裂」。

collocation: Very __ people are able to grow in love；very few + 複數名詞
explanation: very few 是常見固定搭配，「非常少的」，修飾複數名詞 people。

collocation: __ men and women are able to respect...；連接詞引導條件子句
explanation: as long as 是常考連接詞，「只要」，引導條件子句，考生需辨認此連接詞的邏輯用法。

collocation: Love is, __, magical；插入語加強語氣
explanation: indeed 是插入語副詞，用來加強語氣「的確如此」，呼應開頭第一句話，是首尾呼應的關鍵字。

collocation: Many people believe that __ from outer space；beings 泛稱「生物」
explanation: beings 是抽象泛稱詞，指「(外星)生物、存在體」，考生需理解此字可泛指任何生命形式。

collocation: life on Earth __ “out there”；originate 不及物動詞
explanation: originate 是常考不及物動詞，「起源於」，考生需辨認詞性避免誤加受詞。

collocation: aliens have __ what happens on Earth；keep an eye on 固定片語
explanation: keep an eye on 是常考固定片語，「密切注意、監視」。

collocation: the ancient Greek and Roman gods, __ the fairies and dwarfs；as well as 連接對等成分
explanation: as well as 是常考連接詞，「以及」，連接兩個對等的名詞成分。

collocation: Still __ say that...；Some...Others...Still others 平行列舉結構
explanation: 此為 Some say...Others say...Still others say... 的平行列舉句型，考生需辨認第三層列舉的用詞。

collocation: civilizations which have __ perished；since 當副詞(非連接詞「因為」)
explanation: since 在此當副詞用，「從那之後」，考生易誤認為連接詞「因為」，是常見多義字陷阱。

collocation: ancient civilizations, __ the Egyptians...；like 舉例用法
explanation: like 在此當介系詞，「例如」，考生易與動詞「喜歡」混淆，是常見多義字陷阱。

collocation: left writings and __；writings and drawings 並列名詞
explanation: writings and drawings 是常見並列搭配，「文字與圖畫」。

collocation: the aliens intend us __；intend sb harm 固定搭配
explanation: intend someone harm 是常考固定搭配，「意圖傷害某人」。

collocation: no interest in helping us __；in any way 固定片語
explanation: in any way 是常見固定片語，「以任何方式」，常用於否定句加強語氣。

collocation: It is not __ to hear...；not unusual 雙重否定表「常見」
explanation: not unusual 是雙重否定的委婉說法，意思其實是「很常見」，考生需理解此邏輯而非直譯「不尋常」。

collocation: the difficulty they have in __ the stress；have difficulty in V-ing 固定句型
explanation: have difficulty in V-ing 是常考固定句型，「在…方面有困難」，介系詞 in 後面需接動名詞。

collocation: the events __ cause stress；關係代名詞引導形容詞子句
explanation: that 在此是關係代名詞，引導修飾 events 的形容詞子句，考生需辨認關代的文法功能。

collocation: our reactions __ stress；reaction to 固定搭配
explanation: reaction to 是常見固定搭配，「對…的反應」。

collocation: suffer health effects __ stress；effects from 固定搭配
explanation: effects from 是常見固定搭配，「來自…的影響」。

collocation: the six __ causes of death；leading cause 固定搭配
explanation: leading cause 是常考固定搭配，「主要成因」，考生易與 lead 的其他形式混淆。

collocation: account for __ twelve percent；about + 數字
explanation: about 修飾數字，「大約」，考生需辨認此為約數用法。

collocation: necessary, __ desirable；necessary, even desirable 遞進強調句型
explanation: even 在此為遞進強調副詞，「甚至」，連接兩個程度遞增的形容詞。

collocation: Exciting or challenging events __ the birth of a child；like 舉例用法
explanation: like 在此當介系詞舉例，「例如」，考生易與動詞「喜歡」混淆。

collocation: generate __ much stress as does tragedy；as much...as 比較句型
explanation: as much...as 是常考比較句型，「和…一樣多」，考生需辨認此固定句構。

collocation: includes __ necessities but also...；not only...but also 固定句型
explanation: not only...but also 是常考固定句型，「不僅…而且…」。

collocation: housing, and __ necessities；other + N(複數)
explanation: other necessities 是常見固定搭配，「其他必需品」，與前面列舉的 food, clean water, housing 並列。

collocation: Different __ have been employed；method 當主詞
explanation: methods 在此作主詞，「不同的方法」，考生需辨認複數名詞當主詞的句構。

collocation: One of __ measures；these 呼應前句的 methods
explanation: these 在此同指前一句提到的 different methods，是跨句同指的改寫手法。

collocation: the higher this percentage is, the __ is the standard of living；the + 比較級, the + 比較級 句型
explanation: the higher..., the lower... 是常考「越…越…」比較句型，考生需理解此處為反向關係(支出比例越高，生活水準反而越低)。

collocation: income is not distributed __；distribute evenly 固定搭配
explanation: distribute evenly 是常見固定搭配，「平均分配」。

collocation: Some enjoy wealth, __ others suffer in poverty；while 表對比連接詞
explanation: while 在此為對比連接詞，「然而」，連接兩個相對的情況。

collocation: Americans __ different racial and educational backgrounds；with + N 修飾主詞
explanation: with 引導的介系詞片語修飾 Americans，「具有不同種族與教育背景的美國人」。原稿此處答案字母疑似誤植為F(not only)，但F已用於31題且語意不合，已依語意訂正為H。

collocation: People living in different parts...__ show different standards；also 副詞
explanation: also 是常見副詞，「也」，考生需辨認其在句中的位置(動詞前)。

collocation: factors __ household composition and family size；such as 舉例用法
explanation: such as 是常考舉例片語，「例如」。

collocation: On __, Amir and the donkey passed a stream；on the way 固定片語
explanation: on the way 是常考固定片語，「在路上」。

collocation: jumped into the stream to cool __；cool oneself 反身代名詞用法
explanation: cool oneself 是固定用法，「讓自己涼快」，考生需辨認反身代名詞的使用時機。

collocation: ruining the salt for Amir but __ the load for the donkey；lighten(使變輕)非lightning(閃電)
explanation: lightening 是多義字拼寫陷阱——與 lightning(閃電)拼字相近但意義完全不同，此處是動詞 lighten(使變輕)的動名詞形式，考生易看錯字混淆。

collocation: the donkey __ the same trick；play a trick 固定搭配
explanation: play a trick 是常考固定搭配，「耍花招」。

collocation: Amir was very much __ by the donkey's trick；be troubled by 固定搭配
explanation: be troubled by 是常見固定搭配，「被…困擾」，troubled 為過去分詞當形容詞用。

collocation: tried to think of a way to __ the donkey a lesson；teach sb a lesson 固定搭配
explanation: teach someone a lesson 是常考固定搭配，「給某人一個教訓」。

collocation: On the third day, he __ came up with a good idea；finally 副詞修飾動詞
explanation: finally 是常見副詞，「終於」，考生需辨認其修飾動詞片語 came up with 的位置。

collocation: loaded the sacks __ with salt but with sand；not A but B 固定句型
explanation: not A but B 是常考固定句型，「不是A而是B」。

collocation: they became much __；become + 比較級形容詞
explanation: 此格需邏輯推論：沙子泡水後吸水變重，與鹽泡水溶解變輕正好相反，是全文情節反轉的關鍵。

collocation: __ carried Amir's salt to the market；dutifully 修飾 carried
explanation: 此格需邏輯推論：呼應前句「驢子學到教訓」，此後盡責運送不再耍花招，是全文結局的總結性副詞。

collocation: decide for __；decide for oneself 固定搭配
explanation: decide for yourself 是常見固定搭配，「自己判斷決定」。

collocation: dolphins and fishermen are in __ for tuna；in competition for 固定搭配
explanation: in competition for 是常考固定搭配，「為了…而競爭」。

collocation: conflict __ dolphins and fishermen；conflict between A and B 固定搭配
explanation: conflict between A and B 是常見固定搭配，「A與B之間的衝突」。

collocation: “walls” that __ for miles；stretch for + 距離 固定搭配
explanation: stretch for miles 是常見固定搭配，「綿延數英里」，考生易誤解為「伸展身體」的常見義。

collocation: they __ catch many dolphins；also 副詞置於助動詞/一般動詞前
explanation: also 是常見副詞，需辨認其在句中修飾動詞的位置。

collocation: When they are __ in the nets too long；be trapped in 固定搭配
explanation: be trapped in 是常考固定搭配，「受困於…」，trapped 為過去分詞當形容詞用。

collocation: brought __ the ship；bring sb aboard 固定搭配
explanation: bring aboard 是常見固定搭配，「帶上船」。

collocation: the __ death of these wonderful sea creatures；senseless death 固定搭配
explanation: senseless death 是常見固定搭配，「毫無意義的死亡」，帶有惋惜語氣。

collocation: decided to help __ them；help + 原形動詞 固定句型
explanation: help + 原形動詞(省略to)是常考固定句型，「幫忙做某事」。

collocation: their hard work paid __；pay off 固定片語(有回報)
explanation: pay off 是常考固定片語，「有回報、奏效」，考生需整體記憶此片語動詞。

collocation: insisted on my __ my legs behind；insist on + 所有格 + V-ing
explanation: 此格為介系詞 on 後接動名詞的結構，且前面用所有格 my 修飾動名詞(意義上的主詞)，考生易忽略此文法細節。部分考生會誤以為 my 後面只能接名詞而聯想選 (J) way，卻忽略動名詞後面還帶著受詞 my legs 及介系詞片語 behind，需要一個能接受詞的動名詞。

collocation: I was __ annoyed；quite + adj 程度副詞
explanation: quite 是常見程度副詞，修飾形容詞 annoyed。

collocation: he was very __ about it；sorry about 固定搭配
explanation: sorry about 是常見固定搭配，「對…感到抱歉」。

collocation: always in the __；in the way 固定片語(擋路)
explanation: in the way 是常考固定片語，「擋路、造成妨礙」，考生易誤解為字面「在路上」。

collocation: leave their legs __；邏輯呼應前文「寄放」的規定
explanation: 此格需邏輯推論：呼應開頭「insisted on leaving my legs behind」的規定精神，此處是政策的正式說法。

collocation: Under __ circumstances；under normal circumstances 固定搭配
explanation: under normal circumstances 是常考固定搭配，「在正常情況下」。

collocation: didn't want to __ a disturbance；make a disturbance 固定搭配
explanation: make a disturbance 是常見固定搭配，「引起騷動」。

collocation: more __ fixed；副詞修飾過去分詞 fixed
explanation: securely 是副詞，修飾過去分詞 fixed，考生需辨認此詞性搭配(副詞+形容詞化的過去分詞)。

collocation: they __ off quite easily；come off 固定搭配(脫落、鬆開)
explanation: come off 是常考固定搭配，「脫落」，考生易與 came from 等其他片語混淆。

collocation: did not surprise me __ more than...；not...any more than 固定句型
explanation: not...any more than 是常考固定句型，「並不比…更加」，用來加強比較的否定語氣。

collocation: too __ for the regular actor；risky 修飾動作的危險程度
explanation: 此格需邏輯推論：呼應後文列舉的高空跳躍、撞車等危險動作，判斷需要「風險過高」的形容詞。

collocation: emerged out of __；out of necessity 固定搭配
explanation: out of necessity 是常考固定搭配，「因應需求/情勢所迫」。

collocation: no __ crew members；professional 修飾 crew members
explanation: professional crew members 是常見固定搭配，「專業工作人員」。

collocation: they often __ things for the first time；try out 固定搭配
explanation: try out 是常考固定搭配，「嘗試、試做」。

collocation: which __ some their lives；cost sb sth 固定搭配
explanation: cost someone something 是常考固定搭配，「使某人付出…(代價)」，此處為 cost sb their lives(使某人喪命)。cost 三態同形(cost-cost-cost)，此處主詞 which 指代前面「自己犯的錯」，動作發生在過去(與前後文 had to learn、suffered 呼應)，考生易誤判為現在式。

collocation: which __ the use of dedicated stunt people；call for 固定搭配
explanation: call for 是常考固定搭配，「需要、促使」。

collocation: found a new __ as a stunt person；career 呼應「新職業」的語意
explanation: career 是常見固定搭配，「找到新的職業生涯」。

collocation: The 1960s and '70s __ the development；witness 主詞為時代(非人)
explanation: witness 常見主詞是「人」(目擊)，此處主詞是「1960與70年代」這個時間段，屬於「時代見證了…」的擬人化多義用法，考生易只知常見義。

collocation: it is now __ to create...；it is possible to V 句型
explanation: it is possible to V 是常考句型，「…是可能的」。

collocation: the realism and thrilling __；thrilling sensation 固定搭配
explanation: thrilling sensation 是常見固定搭配，「刺激的感受」。

collocation: they are __ to get up early；reluctant to V 固定搭配
explanation: reluctant to V 是常考固定搭配，「不情願做某事」。

collocation: this teen behavior actually has a physical __；physical cause 固定搭配
explanation: physical cause 是常見固定搭配，「生理上的原因」。

collocation: they cannot __ until 8:00 a.m.；awaken 不及物動詞(甦醒)
explanation: awaken 是多義字，此處作不及物動詞「甦醒」，考生需與 wake sb up(喚醒某人)的及物用法區辨。awaken 語氣比 wake up 更正式，cannot awaken until 8:00 a.m. 相當於 cannot wake up until 8:00 a.m.，同時複習 not...until(直到…才…)的經典句型。

collocation: their biological rhythm is __ an early school start time；be in conflict with 固定搭配
explanation: be in conflict with 是常考固定搭配，「與…相衝突」。

collocation: They are, __, not getting the sleep；插入語，表結果
explanation: therefore 在此為插入語，置於 be動詞與現在分詞之間，考生需辨認此插入位置。

collocation: The __ of sleep has negative effects；the lack of 固定搭配
explanation: the lack of 是常考固定搭配，「…的缺乏」。

collocation: performances may drop __ insufficient sleep；due to + N 固定搭配
explanation: due to 是常見固定搭配，「由於」，後接名詞。

collocation: changed the school start time, __ children to start later；分詞構句表結果
explanation: allowing 是現在分詞構句，表示前面動作(改變上學時間)所帶來的結果，相當於 which allows children to start later，是「V-ing表結果的分詞構句」經典句型，考生需辨認此文法結構。

collocation: many positive results, __, a decrease in...；插入語舉例
explanation: for example 在此為插入語，用來具體舉例說明前面提到的「正面成效」。

collocation: were more __ during the day；與 less sleepy 相對的形容詞
explanation: 此格需邏輯推論：與前面「felt less sleepy」語意平行對照，需要表示「精神更好」的形容詞。

collocation: is, therefore, __；邏輯推論(不屬於任何人→免費)
explanation: 此格需邏輯推論：因為太陽能「不屬於任何人」，所以推導出「免費」的結論，沒有明顯固定搭配可直接對應。

collocation: it is the most __；the most + adj 最高級
explanation: 此格需邏輯推論：因為不會造成污染、能減少溫室效應，所以是「最重要的」能源選項。

collocation: helps to __ the greenhouse effect；lessen + N 固定搭配
explanation: lessen the greenhouse effect 是常見固定搭配，「減緩溫室效應」。

collocation: in a most primitive __；in a...manner 固定搭配
explanation: in a...manner 是常考固定搭配，「以…的方式」。

collocation: most of this __ remained mainly academic；work 呼應前句 research and development
explanation: work 在此同指前句提到的「研究與開發」工作，是跨句同指的改寫手法。work 作「工作/研究」解時為不可數名詞，前面才能用限定詞 this 修飾(most of this work)，這也是排除其他可數名詞選項的關鍵線索。

collocation: the dramatic __ in oil prices；rise in 固定搭配
explanation: rise in 是常考固定搭配，「…的上漲」。

collocation: several countries began to __ extensive research programs；design a program 固定搭配
explanation: design a research program 是常見固定搭配，「規劃研究計畫」。

collocation: hang out our clothes to __ in the sun；hang...to dry 固定搭配
explanation: 此格需邏輯推論：曬衣服的目的是要「曬乾」，呼應後文「使用太陽的能量」的語意。

collocation: solar panels __ the energy of the sun；absorb energy 固定搭配
explanation: absorb energy 是常見固定搭配，「吸收能量」。

collocation: Such systems are __ on the market；available on the market 固定搭配
explanation: available on the market 是常見固定搭配，「在市面上可買到」，呼應第一段開頭 available 的用法。

collocation: their __ loved ones；the departed 固定用法(委婉語，指亡者)
explanation: departed 在此是委婉語形容詞，「已故的」，考生易誤解為「離開的」字面義，需理解此為對死者的委婉稱呼。

collocation: that __ day；fateful day 固定搭配
explanation: fateful day 是常見固定搭配，「命運攸關的一天」，指海嘯發生的那天。

collocation: The idea...was first __ by...；bring forth 固定搭配(被動)
explanation: bring forth 是常考固定搭配，「提出、產生」，此處為被動語態 be brought forth by。

collocation: navigate through the __；navigate through 固定搭配
explanation: navigate through sorrow 是常見固定搭配，「走過悲傷」，需理解 navigate 引申為「度過(困難情緒)」的比喻用法。

collocation: The booth he built __ only an old dial phone；house 當動詞(容納)
explanation: house 在此當動詞用，「內部裝有/容納」，考生易只認得常見名詞「房子」的用法，是常見詞性陷阱。

collocation: my thoughts couldn't be __ through a regular phone line；pass on 固定搭配(被動)
explanation: pass on 是常考固定搭配，「傳遞」，此處為被動語態，考生需辨認 be passed on 的結構。

collocation: renders the grieving process more __；render + O + adj 固定句型
explanation: render + 受詞 + 形容詞 是常考固定句型，「使…變得…」，manageable 表「可控制、可應付的」。

collocation: the booth has become a __ between the living and the dead；bridge between A and B 固定搭配
explanation: bridge between A and B 是常見固定搭配(比喻用法)，「A與B之間的橋樑」。

collocation: Grieving is a natural __ for coping with loss；natural mechanism 固定搭配
explanation: natural mechanism 是常見固定搭配，「天生的機制」，此格也是全文核心思想句的關鍵詞。

collocation: __ is always there；此格為句子主詞，呼應全文結語的核心思想
explanation: 此格需邏輯推論：作為句子主詞，呼應後文「他們相信訊息終將傳達給逝者」的信念，答案應為抽象名詞「希望」。

collocation: this cathedral is __ for...；be noted for 固定搭配
explanation: be noted for 是常考固定搭配，「以…聞名」，與 be known for 同義。

collocation: documented __ to the ringing of bells；reference to 固定搭配
explanation: reference to 是常考固定搭配，「對…的提及/記載」。

collocation: each __ a name；bear a name 固定搭配
explanation: bear a name 是常考固定搭配，「帶有名字」，bear 在此有「擁有、帶有」的多義用法，是常考詞彙。

collocation: the only one that __ the French Revolution；survive + N 及物動詞
explanation: survive + N(事件) 是常考固定搭配，「倖存於某事件」，不需加介詞。

collocation: which __ its renowned, excellent sound；retain + N 固定搭配
explanation: retain 是常見及物動詞，「保留」，與前一格 survived 呼應(倖存下來且保留了音質)。

collocation: the bells have become a __ part of life；familiar part of 固定搭配
explanation: familiar part of 是常見固定搭配，「熟悉的一部分」。

collocation: call the __ to prayer；the faithful 固定用法(the+形容詞=一群人)
explanation: the faithful 是常考「the+形容詞＝一群人」的文法規則，指「信徒們」，考生易誤以為 faithful 只能當形容詞用。

collocation: rung in times of __ and of mourning；celebration 與 mourning 相對並列
explanation: celebration 與後文的 mourning(哀悼)形成語意對照，考生需理解此對比關係。

collocation: the bells fell __；fall silent 固定搭配
explanation: fall silent 是常考固定搭配，「陷入沉默」。

collocation: a complex and time-consuming process of __；process of restoration 固定搭配
explanation: process of restoration 是常見固定搭配，「修復的過程」。

collocation: by no means __；by no means + adj 固定搭配(絕不…)
explanation: by no means 是常考固定搭配，「絕不、決不」，用來加強否定語氣，考生易忽略此片語需接形容詞。

collocation: brain size and __；與 brain size 並列的名詞
explanation: function 在此與 brain size 並列，作 linked with 的受詞，考生需辨認此並列結構。

collocation: dementia __；dementia risk 固定搭配
explanation: dementia risk 是常見固定搭配，「失智風險」。

collocation: may significantly __ age-related brain shrinkage；delay + N 固定搭配
explanation: delay 是常見及物動詞，「延緩」，考生需辨認此處為動詞用法(非名詞)。

collocation: help __ acquired knowledge；retain knowledge 固定搭配
explanation: retain knowledge 是常見固定搭配，「保留/記住知識」。

collocation: others __ shorter naps；point to 在此引申為「主張、指向」
explanation: point to 是多義片語，此處取「主張、傾向支持」的引申義，而非字面「用手指」，考生易只知常見義。

collocation: may __ a person's physical condition；depend on 固定搭配
explanation: depend on 是常考固定搭配，「取決於」。

collocation: surprisingly __ benefits；surprisingly + adj 程度副詞修飾
explanation: 此格需邏輯推論：呼應 surprisingly(令人驚訝地)的語氣，需要一個表示「效果顯著」的強烈形容詞。

collocation: a quiet place with __ light；呼應前文 dark space 的語意
explanation: 此格需邏輯推論：呼應前一句「A dark space」的語意，需要「光線極少」的形容詞。

collocation: create a relaxing __；relaxing atmosphere 固定搭配
explanation: relaxing atmosphere 是常見固定搭配，「放鬆的氛圍」。

collocation: __ amounts of exercise；modest amount of 固定搭配
explanation: modest amount of 是常見固定搭配，「適度、不多的量」，考生易誤解 modest 只有「謙虛的」這個常見義。

collocation: a fitness __；fitness fanatic 固定搭配
explanation: fitness fanatic 是常見固定搭配，「健身狂熱者」。

collocation: a motto to __；abide by 固定搭配
explanation: abide by 是常考固定搭配，「遵守、奉行」，此處指「奉行的座右銘」。

collocation: __ health studies；current studies 固定搭配
explanation: current studies 是常見固定搭配，「當前的研究」，呼應與舊觀念(old-fashioned)的對比。

collocation: You might __ that...；might + 原形動詞 + that子句
explanation: 此為常考句型 might + 原形動詞，argue that 表「主張」，考生需辨認此處為原形動詞(非現在式)。

collocation: physically __ exercises；physically demanding 固定搭配
explanation: physically demanding 是常見固定搭配，「體力上費力的」。

collocation: it may __ an injury；point to 引申義(顯示/暗示，非字面「指向」)
explanation: point to 是多義片語，此處取「顯示、暗示」的引申義，而非字面「用手指向」，考生易只知常見義。

collocation: without the __ or discomfort；與 discomfort 並列的名詞
explanation: soreness 與後面的 discomfort 並列，兩者都是常與運動相關的負面感受名詞。

collocation: a powerful __ to improve your health；means to V 固定搭配
explanation: means to V 是常考固定搭配，「達成…的方法」，means 單複數同形，考生易誤判詞性。

collocation: try to __ for exercise；make time for 固定片語
explanation: make time for 是常考固定片語，「為…騰出時間」。
